## What changed

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Provenance checklist

- [ ] No unsourced real-player claims
- [ ] Every visible number has a source, season stamp, approximate label, or unverified label
- [ ] No MLB/team/player photos, logos, footage, or likenesses
- [ ] No copied instructional prose
- [ ] No fake community posts, fake adoption counts, or fake verified badges
- [ ] No medical, injury-prevention, or youth-prescription claims
- [ ] README, UI copy, and data model preserve: “Sourced, not corrected”
